creator: joel@tahoestores.com
text:
(In reply to Christoph Moench-Tegeder from comment #4)

borked??

I am not aware of what exactly that means, except that you are punting.

At this time I am not sure why I even have this port installed, it shows no dependencies and I am tired of having it be the only port out of over 1600 installed on my "borked" system that continues to fail to update.

thanks for your help
